titleStmt.title: SII 4.1114: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 1114. (A.R. Nos. 258 and 259 of 1893). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
bhūpanṛpamakuṭamaṇivrātasaṁraṁjitā
caritraḥ praditapṛdhuyaśaḥpūritāśāṁttarālaḥ sthai¨ryyā
jayati bhuvi kulōttuṁggarājēṁdracōḍaḥ [. 1*] tasyābhūdiṣṭabhṛtyō raghukula
tilakasyēva vāyōstanūjaḥ kommāṁbānaṁdanō dvijavibudhata
russabbanākhyāgrasūnuḥ . śrīmāneṛpābhidhānaḥ patihītacaritaistōṣayitvā nijēśaṁ kō
ṣṭāgārādhikārāṁ dhruvamalabhata yaḥ śrīnidhiścōḍabhūpāt [. 2*] śā bāṇanāgadyuśaśi
parimitē dakṣiṇāśāyanākhyē kālēkṛtvā sahçō¨rvvā kramukavanamadātsōya
meṟi(ya)yābhidānaḥ . dākṣārāmasthitāya tripuravijayinē
saṁvatsa 18 gu śrāhi ka¨rkkāṭakasaṁkrāṁttinimittamuna śrīmanmahāmaṇḍalē
śvara kulōttuṁgarājēṁdracōḍayarājula koṭṭari velanāṇṭilōni niḍuṁbrōli sabbi
nāyakuni koḍuku koṭṭūri Eṟiyamanāyakuṇḍu śrībhīmēśvaramahādēvarakuṁ
(ṁ)balliAvisānivēdyamunaku di 1 ṇṭiki nityapaḍi koṭṭarapu naṁddikuṁccamunaṁ de
llaḍaṁgguṁbrāla ku 8 nu nēti mā 1 nu Oluppuṁ bappu māna 2 ṇḍunu peruvu ku
ṁ 1 nu Ācaṁdrā¨rkkamu naḍacunaṭṭugā Anantārāmamuna tū¨rppuna pōṁkkāmrāṁkkulu
(lu) reṇḍuvēlupaṭṭunu sahavāsi tirupaṭṭarikiṁ dagu velaveṭṭi vilisikoni pōṁkatōṇṭa
veṭṭiṁcci I bhōggamu dēvabhaṇḍāruvu sōcci koṭṭāruvunaṁ baḍi naḍapaṁggalayadigāṁ goṭṭaru
vu Eṟiyamanāyakuṇḍu Ācaṁdrā¨rkkamu naḍavaṁgalayadigā nicci śilaśāsanamu śrīvimā
namunaṁ beṭṭiṁ ce I tōṇṭapaṭṭunaku sīmamula tū¨rppuna paṇḍe prōleseṭṭi tōṇḍagaṭṭuya
sīmamu dakṣiṇamuna sōmāṇḍāri pemmaḍiĀṇḍari tōṇṭagaṭṭuya sīmamu paḍumaṭṭa Anantā
rāmamuna tu¨rppuna tōṇṭakoṟaḍiyaya sīmamu Uttaramuna saptagōdāvariya sīma
mu nibaṁddamu śrībhīmēśvaramahādēvaraka¨rmmi garaṇakaṁggānu napalli
Digital edition of SII 4.1114 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
